methods.description: The bathymetric survey was performed using a hull-mounted multi-beam swath sonar system to map the seafloor topography.

steps.description: The bathymetric survey was performed using the hull-mounted ATLAS Hydrographic HYDROSWEEP DS3.
steps.searchable_summary: use multi-beam sonar to collect seafloor topography data

steps.description: The mean sound velocity of the water column was calculated from CTD, XCTD, and Valeport Sound Velocity Profiler data.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mean sound velocity from CTD and XCTD data

methods.description: Sub-bottom profiling data were acquired to investigate sediment layers beneath the seafloor.

steps.description: Sub-bottom profiling data were acquired using the parametric hull-mounted system ATLAS Hydrographic PARASOUND DS III-P70.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sub-bottom profiling data using PARASOUND system

steps.description: PARASOUND data visualization and processing was performed using ATLAS PARASTORE-3 software.
steps.searchable_summary: process and visualize sub-bottom data with PARASTORE-3

methods.description: Multi-channel seismic (MCS) data acquisition was conducted to analyze subsurface geological structures.

steps.description: MCS data acquisition used a 3,000-m-long streamer and an air gun array.
steps.searchable_summary: acquire MCS data using streamer and air gun array

steps.description: Processing included sorting, frequency filtering, velocity analysis, multiple suppression, and stacking.
steps.searchable_summary: process MCS data with sorting, filtering, and stacking

methods.description: Non-destructive measurements of core samples to determine physical properties.

steps.description: Whole-core measurements included non-destructive, continuous determinations of core geometry, WBD, P-wave velocity, and loop-sensor MS.
steps.searchable_summary: perform non-destructive measurements on core samples

methods.description: Analysis of palynomorphs to assess the age of sedimentary sections.

steps.description: Sediment was freeze dried, weighed, and processed using standard palynological maceration techniques.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare sediment samples for palynological analysis

steps.description: The residue has been mounted with glycerine jelly on microscope slides and scanned for dinoflagellate cysts and acritarchs.

methods.description: Extraction and analysis of biomarkers from sediment samples to study past environmental conditions.

steps.description: Extraction of freeze-dried sediments was carried out using an accelerated solvent extractor with dichloromethane:methanol.
steps.searchable_summary: extract biomarkers from sediment using solvent extraction

steps.description: IP 25 and sterols were analyzed by gas chromatography/mass spectrometry.
